note: Taxonomy v1 (ADR-002, i2). Added `data` to home data-shaped loops that do not fit code-quality. `security` deferred — only one idea so far, kept under code-quality until it earns its own shelf. Librarian owns further evolution via ADR.

categories.name: Build & Ship
categories.desc: Create something new from a spec, feature by feature.

categories.name: Code Quality
categories.desc: Refactor, lint, harden, and modernize existing code.

categories.name: Testing
categories.desc: Grow coverage, kill flakes, strengthen the safety net.

categories.name: Data
categories.desc: Profile, clean, migrate, and reshape data — one field, table, or rule per pass.

categories.name: Docs & Writing
categories.desc: Keep written artifacts alive, honest, and useful.

categories.name: Meta
categories.desc: Loops that build and maintain loop systems themselves.
